notes: Total unique refs: 51. All refs are post-extractor-v1.2 drift — extractor blind spots are expected to be 0. Classification summary: {'NAME_DRIFT_ANDROID_RENAMED': 13, 'TRUE_FABRICATION_ANDROID_ONLY': 31, 'TRUE_FABRICATION_NOWHERE': 6, 'ANDROID_GAP_OTHER_PLATFORMS_HAVE': 1}. Strong SDK gap signals: refs present on 2+ other platforms. Name drift refs: docs using wrong casing (UPPER_SNAKE vs PascalCase for ContentFlagReason) or wrong method names (get vs getComment, stop vs stopRoom, getBroadcastData vs getBroadcasterData). TRUE_FABRICATION_NOWHERE includes nested exception subclasses (AmityException.PermissionDenied etc.) and Builder patterns not in the SDK.
